paragraph: Single-family homes in Elmwood Park are moving in a real seller's market, with a median sale price of $621,500 and nearly 64 percent of homes selling above asking. The sale-to-list ratio sits at 1.02, and the median time on market is under 20 days, which tells you that priced homes are attracting multiple offers and sellers are dictating terms. Multi-family properties are even hotter, with a median of $899,500, a 92 percent rate above asking, and an 18-day median time on market. This tier is narrower in volume but moves decisively when it hits the market. Condo and townhouse inventory is sparse with only five sales over six months at a median of $439,000, though these units are also selling near asking and moving quickly. If you're looking to buy here, understand that you're entering a competitive environment across all property types. Single-family homes offer the most activity and the most choices, but you'll need to be prepared to move fast and price accordingly if you're selling.
